mapper.select: SELECT * FROM workload_weekly WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year_week = #{yearWeek}
SELECT * FROM workload_weekly WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY year_week DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workload_weekly (user_id, team_id, year_week, actual_hours, forecast_hours) VALUES (#{userId}, #{teamId}, #{yearWeek}, #{actualHours}, #{forecastHours}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE actual_hours = VALUES(actual_hours), forecast_hours = VALUES(forecast_hours)
